korean.politics: 서울 서소문 고가차도가 오전 안전진단 작업 도중 붕괴해 3명이 숨지는 사고가 발생했다. 당국은 노후화된 도시 인프라 전반에 대한 긴급 점검에 나섰다. 허위사실 유포 혐의를 받는 '가세연' 대표 김세의에 대한 구속영장 심사가 진행됐다.
korean.economy: 삼성전자 노조 찬반투표가 막바지에 접어들었으며, 27일 오전 결과 발표를 앞두고 시장은 기대감 속에 관망세를 보였다. 동행노조가 투표 절차 중지 가처분을 신청하는 등 막판 변수가 생겨났다.
korean.society: 한국 남자 축구대표팀이 2026 FIFA 월드컵을 앞두고 미국 유타주에서 2차 사전훈련을 시작했다. 하지 성지순례가 아라파트 평원에서 절정을 맞이하며 약 150만 명의 무슬림이 동시에 기도하는 장관이 연출됐다.
korean.international: 미군이 이란 선박들이 호르무즈 해협에서 기뢰를 부설하는 것을 발견하고 이란 남부 미사일 기지를 공습하는 '자위권' 작전을 단행했다. 이란 대통령이 87일간의 인터넷 차단 해제를 명령했다. WHO는 에볼라 사태 대응 속도가 여전히 부족하다고 경고하며 사망자가 220명을 넘었다고 밝혔다.
korean.tech: FIFA가 이란의 미국 내 월드컵 훈련 기지를 멕시코로 변경하는 것을 공식 확인했다. 아제르바이잔과 조지아를 잇는 바쿠-트빌리시 첫 정기 여객열차가 개통했다.

english.politics: A highway overpass in Seoul's Seosomun district collapsed during a safety inspection, killing three people and prompting authorities to launch emergency checks on aging urban infrastructure across the city. A Seoul court held a warrant review hearing for Kim Se-eui, a YouTube broadcaster facing charges of spreading false information about a celebrity's death.
english.economy: Samsung Electronics' union vote entered its final stretch, with results due on the morning of May 27. Markets held steady in anticipation of a ratification. A last-minute complication emerged when a rival union filed for an injunction to halt the voting process.
english.society: South Korea's national men's football team began its second pre-tournament training camp in Salt Lake City, Utah, ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Muslim pilgrims reached the spiritual climax of the Hajj pilgrimage, gathering on the plain of Arafat outside Mecca in a scene of mass prayer.
english.international: The U.S. military carried out self-defense strikes targeting Iranian missile launch sites in southern Iran after boats were observed laying mines near the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian President Pezeshkian ordered the rollback of internet restrictions, ending an 87-day blackout. The WHO warned the Ebola response was still falling short, with over 220 suspected deaths recorded in the DRC.
english.tech: FIFA officially confirmed that Iran had relocated its FIFA World Cup training base from the United States to Mexico due to security concerns related to the ongoing conflict. The first Baku-Tbilisi regular passenger train service between Azerbaijan and Georgia was inaugurated, marking a milestone in South Caucasus connectivity.

vocabulary.example: A highway overpass in Seoul's Seosomun district collapsed during a safety inspection.
A Seoul court held a warrant review hearing for the broadcaster facing fraud charges.
A rival union filed for an injunction to halt the voting process.
The president ordered the rollback of internet restrictions.
The U.S. military carried out self-defense strikes targeting Iranian missile sites.
The first Baku-Tbilisi passenger train service was inaugurated on Monday.

sentences.sentence: The U.S. military carried out self-defense strikes targeting Iranian missile launch sites in southern Iran after boats were observed laying mines near the Strait of Hormuz.
sentences.point: 'carry out strikes(공습을 단행하다)'는 군사 기사의 핵심 표현. 'after + 주어 + were observed + 동사-ing'는 '~하는 것이 목격된 후에'라는 구조.
sentences.similar: The coast guard carried out an inspection targeting suspicious vessels after ships were observed entering restricted waters.

sentences.sentence: A highway overpass in Seoul's Seosomun district collapsed during a safety inspection, killing three people and prompting authorities to launch emergency checks on aging urban infrastructure.
sentences.point: 두 개의 분사구를 and로 이어서 붕괴 사고의 두 가지 결과를 동시에 표현하는 방식. 'prompt + 목적어 + to + 동사원형'은 '~로 하여금 ~하게 하다'.
sentences.similar: A gas explosion at a factory killed two workers, injuring twelve others and prompting regulators to suspend operations at similar facilities.

sentences.sentence: Markets held steady in anticipation of a ratification, as results were due on the morning of May 27.
sentences.point: 'in anticipation of + 명사'는 '~을 기대하며, ~을 앞두고'라는 뜻으로 금융·정치 기사에서 빈출하는 표현.
sentences.similar: Traders held their positions in anticipation of the central bank's rate decision, due later that afternoon.

expressions.usage: 군사 작전에서 공격을 실행할 때 사용하는 핵심 표현
expressions.example: Coalition forces carried out strikes on ammunition depots near the border.

expressions.usage: 어떤 결과나 사건을 예상하고 그에 맞춰 행동할 때 사용
expressions.example: Investors bought tech shares in anticipation of strong earnings results.

expressions.usage: 기대·목표·기준에 못 미칠 때 사용하는 표현
expressions.example: The WHO warned that global funding for the Ebola response was still falling short of what was needed.

challenge.korean: 미군은 이란 선박들이 호르무즈 해협 인근에서 기뢰를 부설하는 것이 목격된 후, 이란 남부 미사일 기지를 자위권 행사로 공습했다.
challenge.answer: The U.S. military carried out self-defense strikes targeting Iranian missile sites in southern Iran after boats were observed laying mines near the Strait of Hormuz.
challenge.explanation: 'carry out strikes'는 공습 단행의 핵심 표현. 'after + 주어 + were observed + 동사-ing'는 '~하는 것이 목격된 후'라는 구조로, 군사·안보 기사에서 행동의 근거를 설명할 때 자주 쓰임. 'targeting + 명사'는 공격 대상을 명시하는 분사.
